channel.title: Access Control on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Access Control on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS
item.description:
Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS in Azure Blob Storage is now generally available in all Azure regions. It adds a scope between container-level and single-blob access for SAS tokens.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: k8s: Announcing the AI Gateway Working Group
item.description:
Kubernetes has formed a new AI Gateway Working Group to define standards and best practices for Gateway API-based networking infrastructure tailored to AI workloads.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Lock and unlock draft repository security advisories
item.description:
GitHub added the ability for repository administrators to lock draft repository security advisories and private vulnerability reports to stop collaborators from editing them.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise-defined custom organization roles are generally available
item.description:
GitHub now generally makes available enterprise-defined custom organization roles to help enterprises standardize role-based access across multiple organizations.

  • Source: GitHub
